race.comment: COOL ZOUSAIN (1) got out late on debut with a respectable third as the ($1.30 fav) over 1007m at this track. Further improved for this and can find winning form quickly.  RED CHICK (9) resumes. Showed ability in her first campaign and expected to get off the mark this time in. Scored a sharp trial win over 800m at Beaumont Newcastle. Leading player. LEGACY PREVAILED (7) King's Legacy filly from Fresh Hope on debut for the Buchanan yard. Ran third in her latest trial over 800m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Can sneak into the minor money. TESORINO (10) resumes. Stuck on well from the outside gate when fourth over 1150m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Back with the one trial and looking for a firmer surface.
